title: Inspire America!
description: That cheesy show with inspirational stories, then everyboby cries, and then everybody dances at the end!
quote: Amazing. But more than amazing, inspiring.
altHero: host Flannery Shedlawn wiping away a tear with a tissue
alt1: Flannery Shedlawn crying while eating a cookie
alt2: Flannery Shedlawn dancing with an elderly woman guest
alt4: at a graduation, speaker with his face in his hands with embarrassment as a student comes on stage
